long_description:
NRE were alerted of link errors incrementing between fcs517b.sr02.dal10 Port-Channel999 <-> fas19b.sr02.dal10 Port-Channel6. Raising this INC to track progress.

Short Description: INC10472314 | fcs517b.sr02.dal10 Et50/1 <-> fas19b.sr02.dal10 Et16/1 | Link Errors
Outage Start: 2025-12-04 01:14:00 UTC
Outage End: 
Severity: 4
Source of detection: monitoring

https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19751
short_description: fcs517b.sr02.dal10 Et50/1 <-> fas19b.sr02.dal10 Et16/1 | Link Errors
close_notes: Link shut to mitigate any further impact. Will proceed to do Layer1 troubleshooting to resolve any issues with the link before adding it back to service. (Note: This incident was resolved via one-touch automation.)
